title: Dispatch
description: Validates a dispatch artifact — the grounded story candidates mined from the corpus, including archive-gap candidates. Produced by report; consumed by edit, write, and factcheck.

issue_id.description: The issue these candidates are for.

candidates.description: The grounded story candidates mined from the corpus.

candidate_id.description: Stable identifier, referenced by lineup, draft, and the issue coverage report.

kind.description: development = something that happened, mined from the record. archive_gap = a materially relevant silence in the record — the absence is itself the story.

headline.description: Provisional headline — what the development is, or what the record fails to show.

summary.description: For a development: what happened. For an archive_gap: what the record does not show and why that matters.

source_trail.description: The records supporting this candidate. The grounding floor: every candidate, including an archive_gap, carries a non-empty source trail. For a development the trail cites the records of what happened; for an archive_gap the trail cites the evidence that the gap exists — a record present in one place with no corresponding record where one was expected.

thread_id.description: If this candidate continues an inherited thread, the thread's id.

locator.description: Where the supporting record is. For an archive_gap, the locator of the record whose absence — or whose unanswered counterpart — constitutes the evidence.

excerpt_or_detail.description: The specific content that supports the candidate. For an archive_gap, the specific observation of absence — what was looked for and not found.
